creator: znerd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please fix the pkg-plist. When I do 'make install deinstall' I get:

===>  Deinstalling for jdbcpool-0.99
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/share/java/jdbcpool/javadoc/AllNames.html' 
doesn't really exist
:
<snip>
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/share/java/jdbcpool/javadoc/tree.html' doesn't 
really exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/java/jdbcpool/examples/gsp'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/java/jdbcpool/examples'
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/share/java/jdbcpool/javadoc/images' doesn't 
really exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/java/jdbcpool/javadoc/images'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/java/jdbcpool/javadoc'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory 
'/usr/local/share/java/jdbcpool'
rmdir: /usr/local/share/java/classes: Directory not empty
rmdir: /usr/local/share/java: Directory not empty
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
incorrectly specified?)
